addMessageAboutImage: Add a message about this image (optional)
dropImageOverlay: Drop image here to analyze for recipes

loading.almostDone: Almost done, just a bit more...
loading.takingLonger: This is taking longer than usual, please be patient...

welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm Meal Maestro, your AI recipe assistant. I can help you create recipes by chatting with me, or you can paste recipe text, share a URL, or even upload a photo for me to analyze. What recipe would you like to work on today?
processingError: I apologize, but I encountered an issue processing your request.
recommendationsReady: Recommendations selected — check the Recommendations section.
recipeExtractedFromUrl: Recipe "{title}" has been successfully extracted from the URL and processed! I've cleaned up the data and populated the form.
recipeCreatedFromTitle: I couldn't scrape the website, but created a complete recipe for "{title}" based on the title from the URL. You can now customize it as needed!
titleExtractedOnly: I couldn't scrape the website, but extracted the title "{title}" from the URL and filled it in. You can now manually add ingredients and instructions.
tryManualCopy: Try copying the recipe text manually and pasting it in the chat, then I can help you process it.
timeoutError: Request timed out - this can happen with complex images or slow connections
importantFunctionCall: You must both make a function call AND provide a text response!
websiteScrapedSuccess: I successfully scraped the website! Here's the raw data I found:
createCompleteRecipe: Now turn this into a complete recipe (using update_recipe_form function)
urlScrapeFailed: I couldn't scrape the website, but extracted the title "{title}" from the URL. Now create a complete recipe based on this title with realistic ingredients, detailed instructions, servings, and appropriate category. Use your culinary knowledge to make a usable recipe that the user can customize.
extractionProcessingError: Recipe data was extracted but there was an issue with processing.
noRecipeFound: Could not find recipe on website
mixedRequestFollowUp: The user asked: "{message}". I have automatically extracted the recipe and filled the form - that's done! Now the user also wants to know: "{additionalContent}". Give a detailed and helpful response to their additional question. No more function calls.
standardFollowUp: The user asked: "{message}". I have automatically filled the recipe form with all ingredients and instructions - it's completely ready! The form is now filled and the user can view it. Give an appropriate response to their original question. No more function calls.
